hero.description: Experience the future of healthcare with blockchain-secured medical records, AI-powered consultations, and seamless appointment scheduling - all in one platform.

features.blockchainDescription: Your medical data is protected with cutting-edge blockchain technology, ensuring an extra layer of security, immutability, and a robust distributed system that you can trust.
features.patientFeatures: For Easy & Efficient Care, we Offer:

offlineAppointments.title: Offline Appointments
offlineAppointments.description: Schedule appointments with verified doctors at multiple clinics. Choose your preferred doctor, clinic, and time slot that fits your schedule.

onlineAppointments.title: Online Consultations
onlineAppointments.description: Connect with doctors virtually from anywhere. Get medical consultations through secure video calls without leaving your home.

queueTracker.title: Real-Time Queue Tracker
queueTracker.description: Know your exact position in the queue and the number of patients ahead. Minimize waiting time and plan your visit efficiently.

userPortal.title: Unified Health Portal
userPortal.description: Store all your medical data, scans, lab results, and medications in one secure place. Share your complete medical history with doctors instantly.

medicineAlerts.title: Medicine Reminders
medicineAlerts.description: Set medication schedules with smart alerts. Track your medication adherence and never miss a dose with our intelligent reminder system.

dailyTracking.title: Daily Health Tracking
dailyTracking.description: Log daily symptoms, pain levels, and health metrics. Monitor your condition over time and provide doctors with detailed health insights.

aiSummary.title: AI Session Summary
aiSummary.description: Automatically generate comprehensive SOAP-format session summaries using AI. Save time on documentation while maintaining detailed medical records.

drugConflict.title: Drug Conflict Detection
drugConflict.description: Digital prescription system with built-in drug interaction checker. Ensure patient safety by avoiding harmful medication combinations.

chatbot.title: AI Medical Assistant
chatbot.description: Get instant answers about patient history and medical queries during consultations. AI-powered assistant helps you make informed decisions.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Getting started with MedicBridge is simple. Follow these four easy steps to begin your healthcare journey.

step1.title: Create Account
step1.description: Sign up in minutes with your basic information.

step2.title: Find Your Doctor
step2.description: Browse through our network of verified doctors.

step3.title: Schedule Appointment
step3.description: Book online or offline appointments as you prefer.

step4.title: Attend Consultation
step4.description: Meet your doctor online or in-person.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Healthcare Experience?
cta.description: Join patients and doctors who trust MedicBridge for secure, efficient, and modern healthcare management.
